headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Launches SecurityEdge Preferred AI Cybersecurity for Small Businesses
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is one of the best growth stocks under $30 to buy now. On June 11, Comcast Business launched SecurityEdge Preferred, a network-native cybersecurity solution designed specifically for small businesses. By embedding AI-powered threat detection directly into the network infrastructure, the service blocks malware, phishing, and ransomware at the network edge without requiring […]
